title: Add password validation logic
body: Introduces validators for complex password strength checks. Ensures numbers, symbols, and casing are verified.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+import re
+
+def validate_password_strength(password: str) -> bool:
+    # Complex password requirements: length >= 8, must contain digit, upper, lower, and symbol
+    if len(password) < 8:
+        return False
+    if not re.search(r"[A-Z]", password):
+        return False
+    if not re.search(r"[a-z]", password):
+        return False
+    if not re.search(r"[0-9]", password):
+        return False
+    if not re.search(r"[!@#$%^&*(),.?\":{}|<>_]", password):
+        return False
+    return True
